curation.synopsis: Horus is dead. The Emperor is silent. Terra lies in ruin, and the survivors of the longest civil war in human history are left to discover what holds an Imperium together when the man who founded it can no longer answer. As the Loyalist primarchs argue over how to pursue the broken traitor legions back into the dark, opportunists move into the gaps in authority, the High Lords measure each other for new crowns, and ordinary citizens try to live in cities that still smoke. The first novel of The Scouring follows the great houses and the small ones across that uncertain morning, asking what a victory paid in this much blood is actually worth, and who decides what comes next.

flags.reason: Roster fuehrt 'Charles Wraight'; Black-Library-Publikation, Simon & Schuster und Goodreads listen 'Chris Wraight'.
Erstauflage-Roman einer neuen Serie; konkrete POV-Charaktere sind aus oeffentlichen Plot-Synopsen noch nicht eindeutig benennbar.
